name: visual-result-showcase
summary: Turn completed Roboclaws run artifacts into honest, publishable visual showcases.

mcp.boundary_notes: Post-run artifact renderer. It does not call MCP tools or robot backends, and must label report-only views and post-run evaluation explicitly.

capability_requirements.notes: Consumes completed run artifacts from any backend that writes robot_view_steps and image files.

scripts.summary: Compose a chaptered household cleanup GIF, contact sheet, frames, and manifest from run_result.json, trace.jsonl, and robot_views.

refactor_signals: multiple task-specific showcase renderers duplicate frame layout or trace-bar logic
blog and README visual outputs need a shared style profile
video or platform-specific exports become common enough to need reusable presets
promote_to_mcp_when: never by default; showcase rendering is post-run artifact presentation, not a robot capability
